# terrible_community_general_oneandone_public_ip (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `api_url` (String) Custom API URL. Overrides the `ONEANDONE_API_URL` environment variable.
- `auth_token` (String) Authenticating API token provided by 1&1.
- `datacenter` (String) ID of the datacenter where the IP is created (only for unassigned IPs).
- `public_ip_id` (String) The ID of the public IP used with update and delete states.
- `reverse_dns` (String) Reverse DNS name. maxLength=256.
- `state` (String) Define a public IP state to create, remove, or update.
- `type` (String) Type of IP. Currently, only IPV4 is available.
- `wait` (Boolean) Wait for the instance to be in state 'running' before returning.
- `wait_interval` (Number) Defines the number of seconds to wait when using the _wait_for methods.
- `wait_timeout` (Number) How long before wait gives up, in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `public_ip` (String) Information about the public IP that was processed.
